title: enistemi #1764
definition:
1) to place in or among, to put in
 2) to be upon, impend, threaten
 3) close at hand
 4) present
nasbUsage:

 2) to be upon, impend, threaten
 3) close at hand
 4) present

    NASB:  to place in, to be at hand, perf. part. to be present:
